description_long: This machine gun object is constructed with a combination of metallic and wooden elements, giving it a rugged, industrial appearance. The main body and head are composed of gray, riveted metal plates, with a prominent barrel extending from the top center. The arms and legs are fashioned from cylindrical wooden barrels and planks, reinforced with metal bands and plates, suggesting a makeshift, armored design. The head features a pair of horn-like protrusions and a faceplate with two circular details resembling eyes. The back view reveals more wooden barrel staves and additional metal bracing, emphasizing its robust, cobbled-together structure. The overall form is humanoid, with articulated limbs and a stance that suggests both mobility and defensive capability.
description: A humanoid machine gun object made from gray metal plates and wooden barrels, featuring a prominent barrel, horned head, and reinforced limbs. Its rugged, industrial design combines metallic and wooden textures for a makeshift armored look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered metal head, protruding barrel, and the wooden barrel construction of the limbs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the horned head, faceplate, central barrel, and symmetrical arrangement of metal and wood components.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the wooden and metal limb construction.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the wooden barrel staves, metal bracing, and the back of the horned head.
attribute_barrel_type: standard cylindrical barrel with metallic finish and no visible cooling features
attribute_stock_design: fixed wooden stock with reinforced metal bands and a blocky, ergonomic shape
attribute_iron_sight_configuration: simple fixed front and rear iron sights integrated into the head structure
